narratives.Overview: KeepTrack is a lightweight cross-platform personal task manager built with Flutter and Supabase. It lets a single user capture, categorize, and track to-dos with tags and due dates, and auto-imports tasks from Gmail (labeled messages) and Slack (emoji reaction). v1 ships for macOS and iOS with Google OAuth and online-only sync. A later phase introduces multi-user personal accounts with optional shared lists.
narratives.Architecture: Flutter app (single codebase, macOS + iOS targets) talking directly to Supabase for auth (Google OAuth), Postgres storage, and Row Level Security. Two Supabase Edge Functions handle integrations: a Gmail poller (cron) that pulls messages with the 'todo' label via the Gmail API, and a Slack events handler that receives reaction_added events and creates tasks when the trigger emoji is used. All data is keyed by user_id with RLS enforcing per-user isolation. Online-only in v1 — no local cache layer.

Initialize Flutter project with macOS + iOS targets
